segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Did the young man speak English?

translations.zh-Hans: 那个年轻人会讲英语吗？

segments.text: I had an amusing experience last year.

translations.zh-Hans: 去年我有过一次有趣的经历。

segments.text: After I had left a small village in the south of France, I drove on to the next town.

translations.zh-Hans: 离开法国南部的一个小村庄后，我继续驶往下一个城镇。

segments.text: On the way, a young man waved to me.

translations.zh-Hans: 途中，一个年轻人向我挥手。

segments.text: I stopped and he asked me for a lift.
As soon as he had got into the car, I said good morning to him in French, and he replied in the same language.

translations.zh-Hans: 他一上车，我就用法语向他道早安，他也用同样的语言回答。

segments.text: Apart from a few words, I do not know any French at all.

translations.zh-Hans: 除了个别词以外，我完全不懂法语。

segments.text: Neither of us spoke during the journey.

translations.zh-Hans: 旅途中我们谁也没有说话。

segments.text: I had nearly reached the town when the young man suddenly said very slowly, Do you speak English?

translations.zh-Hans: 快到城里时，那年轻人突然慢慢地说：“你会讲英语吗？”

segments.text: As I soon learnt, he was English himself.

translations.zh-Hans: 我很快便知道，他自己就是英国人。
